info.name: SafeeMeet API
info.description:
Full API collection for the SafeeMeet backend (Laravel + Sanctum).

Auth: most endpoints require a Sanctum bearer token. Run one of the Auth requests first, then copy the returned `accessToken` into the `access_token` environment variable (the login/register/verify-otp requests do this automatically via a test script).

Base URL is controlled by the `base_url` environment variable.

item.name: Auth - Firebase (primary)

request.description: provider: google | apple | phone | email. providerToken is the Firebase ID token from the client SDK.

response.name: Success - Registered

originalRequest.description: provider: google | apple | phone | email. providerToken is the Firebase ID token from the client SDK.

response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Registration successful.",
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "1|aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789",
    "refreshToken": "2|zYxWvUtSrQpOnMlKjIhGfEdCbA9876543210",
    "user": {
      "id": "01J6X6ZQ9K8V2N3E4M5P6R7S8T",
      "safeeId": "SM-A1B2C3D4",
      "displayName": "Jane Doe",
      "avatarUrl": null,
      "accountType": "normal",
      "authProvider": "email",
      "status": "active",
      "onboardingStatus": "completed",
      "kycStatus": "unverified",
      "trustScore": 25,
      "trustTier": "unverified",

      "createdAt": "2026-07-10T08:00:00.000000Z"
    },
    "isRegistered": true
  }
}

item.description: Used by the shipped app. register/login/etc. are public; me/logout require a bearer token.

item.name: Auth - Phone OTP (newer flow)

response.name: Error - Already registered
Error - No account

request.description: name is required only if this phone number doesn't have an account yet.

originalRequest.description: name is required only if this phone number doesn't have an account yet.

response.name: Error - Invalid or expired OTP
Error - Too many attempts

item.description: Not yet wired into the shipped app. register/login/login-or-register/verify-otp are public and rate-limited.
